description_long: This is a compact, single-engine airplane with a rounded fuselage and a short, stubby nose. The body is primarily painted light blue with white flame-like accents and a tricolor tail fin in green, white, and red, reminiscent of the Italian flag. The wings are straight and low-mounted, extending widely from the fuselage, and the tail section features a conventional vertical stabilizer. The cockpit is positioned near the front of the fuselage and appears to be enclosed, with a small canopy visible. The landing gear consists of two main wheels and a small tail wheel, indicating a taildragger configuration. The overall design is reminiscent of vintage racing or sport aircraft, with a playful and stylized appearance.
description: A small, vintage-style airplane with a blue fuselage, white flame accents, and a tricolor tail fin, featuring low-mounted straight wings and a taildragger landing gear.
description_view_0: Side view showing the blue fuselage, white flame accents, and the tricolor tail fin; the wing and tailwheel are clearly visible.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the rounded nose, wide straight wings, and the narrow profile of the cockpit canopy.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, with the tricolor tail fin and wing visible from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the tail section, vertical stabilizer, and both main landing gear wheels.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, straight wings with no visible dihedral or winglets.
attribute_engine_type: Single front-mounted piston engine with a propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Taildragger configuration with two main fixed wheels and a small tail wheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a small canopy.
